form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr7) over 1710m at Goulburn was 7th-14.2 at the bell, beaten 14 m by The Greek General (2:02.80) in NR up to 80 on March 30 at $34. At the run before 8th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track was 9th-17.92 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Double Fear (1:52.30) in NR up to 75 on March 24 at $7.50. Place hope.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 1.4 m fourth behind Double Fear at this track over 1609m NR up to 75 last start. Before that was beaten 4 metres fourth again at this track in NR up to 80 on February 28. Should be at peak fitness and can go close.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 4th-7.29 beaten 1.75 m by Miki Cohen (1:52.50) in NR up to 75 on March 31 at $3.50. Good each way prospect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up in the home straight and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track was 4th-12.31 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Catseye Beach (1:51.10) in NR up to 80 on February 28 at $18. Two runs back 5th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track was 5th-12.45 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Montalbano (1:52.50) in NR up to 75 on February 17 at $7.50. This looks far too tough.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up won by 5.5 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at Bathurst (2:05.00) beating Uncle Tony in NR up to 48 on September 10 at $1.40. First-up winner in the past and is a contender.

form.formComment: Last start on strong from last on the turn and won by 1.75 m as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (1:52.50) beating Ohoka Cobra in NR up to 75 on March 31 at $2.70 at the bell was 6th-11.15. In form and should feature in the finish again.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by a nose as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (1:52.30) beating Jilliby Fabio in NR up to 75 on March 24 at $3.10 at the bell was leading 3.87. Can play a role again.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 6th (Fr2) over 2125m after showing early speed at Penrith, beaten 40 m by Ima Boxa (2:29.90) in LR NR up to 70 on March 20 at $5.50. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 3 m (Fr5) at Penrith (2:34.10) beating Tiger Prince in NR up to 70 on March 12 at $6 at the bell was leading 2.76. Can play a role in the finish.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr2) over 1710m at Goulburn, at the bell was 8th-15.4 beaten 10 m by The Greek General (2:02.80) in NR up to 80 on March 30 at $5.50. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr8) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway beaten 30 m by Usyk (2:44.00) in NR up to 80 on February 27 at $23. Hasn't drawn the best again but he is a player.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of three months. Finished off last preparation recording by a head as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Penrith (2:04.40) beating Time To Dance in NR up to 65 on January 8 at $1.33 at the bell was leading 1.7m on the pegs. Tricky draw to overcome but should go well.
